meaning: n.<口>好朋友,伙伴,同志;vi.结为朋友;Phase Alternating Line,PAL制式(逐行倒相制式)
examples: Philip is looking for a pen pal in Britain.
This letter is from your Australian pen pal.
If I were you, pal, I'd stay away from her!
Jack Welch wasn t the first tough character that Kushal Pal Singh ran into.
Your pal, Glen Beck, for example, appeals mainly to people over the age of 55.
